narrative: Decide and implement analytics path for Sidecar website: pick (a) connect Google Search Console to the Sidecarcapitalpartners Ahrefs project (Settings → connect GSC), or (b) export GSC Performance (last 6-12 months CSV) + GA4 Traffic Acquisition (last 6-12 months) and share with Max — then actually execute the chosen path so Max can build baseline + 6/12-month targets tied to Field Notes launch
title: Decide and implement analytics path for Sidecar website (connect GSC to Ahrefs OR export GSC+GA4 last 6-12 months)
